---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
Provide detailed steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📱 Current Behavior
A clear and concise description of what is actually happening.

## 🖼️ Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🌐 Environment
Please complete the following information:

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.18.0, 21.5.0]
- **Package Manager**: [e.g. pnpm 8.10.0, npm 10.0.0]
- **Chidori Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## 📦 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## 🔍 Possible Solution
If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please describe them here.

## ✅ Checklist
Please confirm the following:

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues that describe this problem
- [ ] I have checked that this bug is not already fixed in the latest version
- [ ] I have provided enough information to reproduce the issue
- [ ] I have included relevant screenshots if applicable
- [ ] I have filled out all applicable sections of this template

## 📎 Additional Files
If you have any relevant files (logs, configs, etc.), please attach them here.
